# Fieldset

A form fieldset component for grouping related form fields together with a legend, helper text, and error messaging. Wraps the native `<fieldset>` semantics.

## Import

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
import { Fieldset } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Usage: <Fieldset.Legend />, <Fieldset.Content />, etc.

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
import {
  Fieldset,
  FieldsetLegend,
  FieldsetContent,
  FieldsetHelperText,
  FieldsetErrorText,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Nested Property | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Fieldset` | - | The root wrapper (renders `Fieldset.Root`). Manages group-level state |
| `FieldsetLegend` | `Fieldset.Legend` | The legend/title for the fieldset group |
| `FieldsetContent` | `Fieldset.Content` | Container for the grouped form fields |
| `FieldsetHelperText` | `Fieldset.HelperText` | Helper text displayed below the fieldset content |
| `FieldsetErrorText` | `Fieldset.ErrorText` | Error message displayed when the fieldset is invalid |

## Fieldset (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the fieldset group is in an invalid state |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether all fields within the fieldset are disabled |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | The fieldset contents (legend, content, helper/error text) |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
<Fieldset>
  <Fieldset.Legend>Contact Information</Fieldset.Legend>
  <Fieldset.Content>
    <Field label="First Name">
      <Input placeholder="John" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="Last Name">
      <Input placeholder="Doe" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="Email">
      <Input type="email" placeholder="john@example.com" />
    </Field>
  </Fieldset.Content>
  <Fieldset.HelperText>All fields are required</Fieldset.HelperText>
</Fieldset>

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
<Fieldset>
  <FieldsetLegend>Contact Information</FieldsetLegend>
  <FieldsetContent>
    <Field label="First Name">
      <Input placeholder="John" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="Last Name">
      <Input placeholder="Doe" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="Email">
      <Input type="email" placeholder="john@example.com" />
    </Field>
  </FieldsetContent>
  <FieldsetHelperText>All fields are required</FieldsetHelperText>
</Fieldset>
```

### With error state

```jsx
<Fieldset invalid>
  <Fieldset.Legend>Shipping Address</Fieldset.Legend>
  <Fieldset.Content>
    <Field label="Street">
      <Input placeholder="123 Main St" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="City">
      <Input placeholder="New York" />
    </Field>
  </Fieldset.Content>
  <Fieldset.ErrorText>Please complete all required fields</Fieldset.ErrorText>
</Fieldset>
```

### Disabled group

```jsx
<Fieldset disabled>
  <Fieldset.Legend>Locked Section</Fieldset.Legend>
  <Fieldset.Content>
    <Field label="Username">
      <Input value="admin" />
    </Field>
    <Field label="Role">
      <Input value="Administrator" />
    </Field>
  </Fieldset.Content>
</Fieldset>
```

## Features

- Groups related form fields with semantic `<fieldset>` structure
- Legend provides an accessible group title
- Propagates `disabled` state to all child form fields
- Supports group-level validation with error text
- Compound component pattern for flexible layout
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
